title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Unisys India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Unisys India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Unisys India Holdings Services in Jaipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Unisys India Holdings Services:
Unisys India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unisys India Holdings Services!
